prompt: Create a polished vertical anime illustration of a beautiful young woman in an ornate East Asian fantasy setting, waist-up portrait, centered composition. She has very long flowing black hair with purple highlights blowing dramatically to the left, with a few strands across her face, and her face is intentionally covered by a flat opaque mauve-pink square censor block centered over the eyes, nose, and mouth. She wears a crisp white button-up blouse with subtle lace details and glossy moonlit highlights, a dark purple open kimono-style outer robe with wide sleeves, gold trim, embroidered floral and ornamental patterns, a black high-waisted skirt, and a black belt with gold rings, tassels, and decorative clasps. Add gold jewelry: a necklace with an ornate pendant and dangling earrings with yellow tassels. Her right arm is raised behind her head in a graceful pose, while the other arm is relaxed and partly hidden by the robe. The background is a luminous round moon framed by a circular window, with purple flowering branches around the window, dark wooden lattice details, warm bokeh lights, and exactly two visible red hanging lanterns on the right side, one near the upper corner and one lower along the edge. Use a dreamy nighttime palette of deep navy, violet, lavender, warm gold, and lantern red. The lighting should be romantic and cinematic, with bright moon backlight, soft rim light on hair and clothing, delicate sparkles, crisp line art, highly detailed fabric folds, glossy highlights, and an elegant illustrious anime style. No extra characters, no text, no watermark.
